TEXT.citation: 溪口射魚達人. (2025, May 05). In Wikipedia [Atayal]. https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/溪口射魚達人
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_溪口射魚達人, title = 溪口射魚達人, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/溪口射魚達人} }

S.FORM: == 溪口射魚達人 == Losun 的人, ,Losun 是入贅的,有一次親戚 Qesuw Puna 來訪,我父親Watan Tanga就和 Losun ,Losun ,Sanay Ywahuy和Losun Batu Qesu Puna Qesu ,Sanay還特地為Losun ,Losun ,當Losun ,只見Losun Losun的蹤影,Sanay .
== 溪口射魚達人 == Losun 的人, ,Losun 是入贅的,有一次親戚 Qesuw Puna 來訪,我父親Watan Tanga就和 Losun ,Losun ,Sanay Ywahuy和Losun Batu Qesu Puna Qesu ,Sanay還特地為Losun ,Losun ,當Losun ,只見Losun Losun的蹤影,Sanay .
S.PHON: == ****** == los~ɕun **, ,los~ɕun ****,***** qes~ɕuw puna **,***watan taŋa** los~ɕun ,los~ɕun ,s~ɕanaj jwaħuj*los~ɕun βatu qes~ɕu puna qes~ɕu ,s~ɕanaj****los~ɕun ,los~ɕun ,*los~ɕun ,**los~ɕun los~ɕun***,s~ɕanaj .
